channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Canterbury Road is filthy! Needs sweeping, 1st March
item.description:
Canterbury Road is filthy! Needs sweeping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 1st March
item.description:
Pot holes all the way up bounces road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bounces Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing street light, 1st March
item.description:
The lamppost was knocked down during an RTA 6months ago. It was removed and has not been replaced. The street is very dark and the adjacent bus stop feels dangerous to wait at after dark.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 1st March
item.description:
Loads of potholes all the way up Victoria Road from park lane all the way up to church street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Sofa-bed, 1st March
item.description:
This sofa bed was abandoned by 3 men on Saturday 28/02/2026 around 11.55-58 pm. The house at the corner probably has them on camera. They lied when confronted and went back home which was in the direction of Basildon Road. I would bet one of them at least doesn’t live far.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howarth Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Could pavement around tree pit be inspected please?, 1st March
item.description:
Could this pavement be checked out please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 95, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 1st March
item.description:
Large pothole which needs filling

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on the cycle lane, 1st March
item.description:
There are multiple potholes in the cycle lane. To avoid them i had to swerve onto the road, just as it curves and very nearly got hit by a car.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In bus stop outside Inverforth House (same side of road), 1st March
item.description:
Pothole or pothole cluster
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North End Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fallen branch obstructing path, 1st March
item.description:
This has been here for several weeks and it's not convenient for the many families with prams. Thanks in advance for removing it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royston Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Station Rise SE27 9BW outside number 12 (Xquisite, 1st March
item.description:
Station Rise SE27 9BW outside number 12 (Xquisite restaurant) is a Lambeth pink powder coated painted metal cycle parking ‘rail’ has been graffiti tagged – Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7A, Station Rise, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the bus shelter, 1st March
item.description:
Graffiti on the bus shelter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Roseacre Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Repeated dog fouling, 1st March
item.description:
Repeated dog fouling. This area was recently cleaned and the dog fouling appeared days after. This is becoming a huge nuisance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darenth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: YB07 BKG Honda Dumped, 1st March
item.description:
Black Honda YB07 BKG dumped in Kemerton Road No Road TAX since 1st August 2025 or MOT 1st December 2025.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kemerton Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish has been dumped here, 1st March
item.description:
Repeatedly having issues with fly tipping in this green space. Weekly rubbish is being dumped here, this is a lovely area, however, we are bein plagued by fly tippers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fulthorp Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish been dumped on grass, 1st March
item.description:
Rubbish been dumped on grass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Steyning Grove, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of rubbish been dumped, 1st March
item.description:
Rubbish been dumped on grass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Steyning Grove, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People urinating and deficating in the bushes adjacent to number 10, 1st March
item.description:
The bushes are continually cut in such a way that it creates a path between and behind them that encourages people to use the area for urinating or worse whilst the wait for buses. My garden is the other side of the wall and I’m extremely concerned about the hazard this is causing and vermin this is attracting. I request that the bushes are allowed to grow in order the close the path that been created

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of rubbish been dumped again, 1st March
item.description:
Loads of house hold rubbish been dumped again on the hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture and garden waste, 1st March
item.description:
Never ending problem of fly tipping on this corner. Furniture, baby car seat, large garden waste. Obstructing pathway.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dublin Avenue, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
